sourceMovie.title: Demon City
sourceMovie.whyPeopleLoveIt: Demon City (2025) stuck because it commits to its action premise without apologizing—viewers remember set pieces and momentum as much as plot. Seiji Tanaka's control of tone keeps the ride coherent. The action and crime blend is the engine: it lets the film shift registers without feeling like two different movies stitched together.

recommendations.title: Run All Night
recommendations.whyYoullLoveIt: If Demon City clicked for you, Run All Night (2015) is a strong next stop: both trade in action and crime, with unease that lingers after the credits. Expect a different story, but a similar willingness to go big when the moment demands it.

faq.question: What should I watch after Demon City?
faq.answer: Try Run All Night, Extraction 2, Branded to Kill—each shares DNA with Demon City while changing the setting enough to feel fresh.

faq.question: What genre is Demon City?
faq.answer: Demon City (2025) is best described as Action, Crime, Fantasy, Thriller. Stores and algorithms use different labels, but that mix is what fans actually recognize on a rewatch.

faq.question: Is Demon City worth revisiting?
faq.answer: Viewer scores sit around 6.9/10 on TMDB—high enough that replays are common for people who like this action lane.
